rationale: The cited paper concerns behavioral bias in integrating discrepant sales forecasts via evoked-range plausibility inferences, while the citing paper’s core focus is false-consensus projection and preference-suppression interventions in marketer judgments. Although both sit in managerial judgment/bias territory, the provided evidence includes only a DOI match (no in-text citation context or surrounding text), so it is not safe to treat this as clearly incidental or clearly substantive.
